message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle italic skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0 skinparam classHeaderFontColor black skinparam classHeaderAlignment center skinparam classAttributeFontColor black skinparam classMethodFontColor black skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classMethodIconSize 0 skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classMethodIconSize 0 skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classMethodIconSize 0 class "ConcreteDecorateA" as ConcreteDecorateA { + addState + operation() } class "ConcreteDecorateB" as ConcreteDecorateB { + operation() ~ {super.operation(); addBehavior();} + addBehavior() } class "Decorator" as Decorator { + component: Component + operation() ~ component.operation(); } class "ConcreteComponent" as ConcreteComponent { + operation() } interface "Component" as Component { + operation() } ConcreteDecorateA --|> Decorator ConcreteDecorateB --|> Decorator Decorator o-- Component ConcreteComponent ..|> Component Decorator ..|> Component note top of ConcreteDecorateA C end note note top of ConcreteDecorateB C end note note top of Decorator A end note note top of ConcreteComponent C end note note top of Component I end note @enduml
